title: Beypack
description: This modpack specially designed for beylands server players
body:
This modpack provides all the conveniences needed when playing on a server

Performance

Beypack is usually faster than OptiFine thanks to modern performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium and more!

OptiFine parity

Beypack supports almost all OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures and zoom. You can even get your own free cape!

Minor tweaks

Beypack includes a few minor tweaks that don't break the vanilla feel, such as extended chat history, windowed fullscreen mode, fixes to most common bugs and utilities to diagnose crashes.

Works everywhere

Beypack has no content mods, so it works on any world or server. The modpack can be run on 4 launchers, is hosted on 3 sites and is translated to many languages.

Up to date

Beypack receives fast updates and is one of the first modpacks to upgrade to newer Minecraft versions.

Built on Fabric

Compared to Forge, Fabric is lightweight, updates and loads fast, and still has great mod support.

Helpful community

We have a growing community of friendly members who like to discuss the pack and help each other. Join us today!
